action.reasoning: Observation: minimal Python/torch environment works, but both torch.load on provided giant .pt files and OGB dataset construction trigger immediate segfaults, suggesting a low-level issue with those serialized graph sources in this environment. Analysis: we need an alternate local data source. Since the task is ogbg-molpcba and rdkit is installed, the raw CSV.gz and split files may exist under /data even if processed loaders crash. A robust fallback is to build our own dataset from raw SMILES using RDKit, avoiding torch.load/OGB internals entirely. First we must inspect /data recursively for raw files and verify RDKit can parse them. Decision: add a filesystem/raw-data diagnostic script and run it; if raw molpcba files exist, next iteration will implement a custom RDKit->PyG pipeline and resume the mandatory early baseline/eval.
